title: rhamnus rubra subsp. obtusissima
intro: Rhamnus rubra subsp. obtusissima, also known as the Red Alder or Red Buckthorn, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Rhamnus rubra subsp. obtusissima include supporting liver and kidney function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support liver and gallbladder function.
